designBrief.silhouette: angled missile pods / flak array plus a visible radar element
requiredComponents: upward-angled missile pods or flak barrels
designBrief.palette: dark ceramic with yellow/gold emissive accents
designBrief.rtsReadabilityNotes: Must stay readable from an isometric RTS camera at distance; no noisy micro-detail that shimmers; faction accent visible but not overwhelming; no text.

promptCandidates: Stylized seamless sci-fi military vehicle hull texture sheet for a yellow faction anti-air platform in an alien RTS. Material: iridescent ceramic-alloy, energy lattice inlays. Palette: dark ceramic with yellow/gold emissive accents, with a subtle low-contrast camouflage pattern in the faction hue. Rich surface detail: riveted armor plates, weld seams, maintenance hatches and access panels, air intakes and cooling grilles, stowed spare parts (track links, tool boxes), strapped-down reserve fuel canisters, scuffed edges and oil stains. Alien design language: gyroscopic, energy lattice, floating segments, solar-forged. Faction markings as abstract glyphs and small stencil icons. Forbidden: single forward cannon (reads as tank). Must stay readable from an isometric RTS camera at distance; no noisy micro-detail that shimmers; faction accent visible but not overwhelming; no text.

A seamless, flat orthographic texture sheet depicting a sci-fi vehicle hull, specifically for a yellow anti-air platform. The dominant material is a dark, highly iridescent ceramic-alloy, exhibiting subtle shifts in color across its surface. Intricate energy lattice inlays glow with a vibrant yellow and shimmering gold emissive light, tracing geometric patterns and highlighting structural seams. Alien industrial surface details, like etched conduits, vent arrays with unusual forms, and sensor nodules, are seamlessly integrated into the dark ceramic, presenting a complex yet uniform aesthetic, completely devoid of perspective, baked lighting, or any text.

Generate a high-detail, seamless orthographic texture-sheet for the hull of a futuristic yellow anti-air platform, presented without perspective or pre-rendered lighting. The surface is crafted from a deep, almost obsidian-like iridescent ceramic-alloy, catching and reflecting ambient light with subtle, shifting hues. Bold yellow and antique gold emissive accents delineate powerful energy lattice inlays that crisscross the material, suggesting conduits and power distribution. The texture integrates unique alien industrial surface elements: perhaps strange alien script-like engravings forming functional patterns, asymmetric plating, or subtly pulsating indicator lights that are part of the emissive accents, all maintaining a strictly flat, two-dimensional appearance without any text.

notes: Gameplay stats are defined in src/data/unitClasses.ts and were not touched.
